core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss Precision with Organic Freshness.
Emotion First: Every screen must feel 'Clean' and 'Efficient'.
Content is King: Data density without clutter.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to separate logical groups, not lines.
anti_patterns: No center-aligned layouts for data-heavy views.
No default Shadcn 'Card' look - customize borders and shadows.

primary.name: Fresh Sky
primary.usage: Primary Actions, Active States, Brand Highlights

headings.usage: Page Titles, Card Headers, Big Stats

containers.dashboard_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-sky-600 hover:bg-sky-700 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-sky-600 hover:bg-sky-50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-sky-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-100 rounded-lg h-10 transition-all
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1.5 block

cards.stat_card: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-[0_2px_10px_-4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] hover:border-sky-100 transition-colors
cards.table_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm

status_badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

login_bg.usage: Login page background with blur overlay

delivery_hero.usage: Orders page empty state or hero

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px for elegance, 2px for active states

implementation_rules.styling: Use Tailwind utility classes primarily. Avoid custom CSS unless for complex animations.
implementation_rules.accessibility: Ensure all text has contrast ratio > 4.5:1. Use semantic HTML.
implementation_rules.testing: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients on text.
Do not use generic center alignment.
